name: Cat Litter Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef, turkey or pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together all dump ingredients in a large bowl using clean hands.
3. Mold pieces of the mixture into various sizes and shapes, placing them so they don't touch each other in an ungreased baking pan. Use two pans if necessary.
4. Bake for about 20 minutes or until the dumps are brown, firm, and slightly crusty.
5. While the meat cooks, add all four litter ingredients to a large saucepan.
6. Heat on high until the water comes to a boil, stirring occasionally.
7. Reduce heat to low and cover the pan. Simmer without lifting the lid for 14 minutes.
8. Remove the saucepan from the stove and carefully lift off the lid (avoiding steam).
9. Break apart or "fluff" the rice with a fork and set aside.
10. When the dumps are done, carefully transfer them onto paper towels to drain.
11. Spoon the rice and dumps into the now empty baking pan, leaving some dumps partially uncovered, as cats do when in a hurry.
12. Serve 8-10 people using a large spoon.
